privileged_info_summary: Task requires creating a Drupal Commerce product attribute labeled 'Color' with exactly five specific color values: Midnight Black, Arctic White, Ocean Blue, Forest Green, and Sunset Red. The attribute must be associated with the 'default' product variation type. All metadata claims are accurate and consistent with the task description and verification scripts. The color values are synthetic task-specific values created during task execution, not from any external data source.
